name: finance-ev-challenges
description: Use web_search to search for 'electric vehicle adoption barriers charging infrastructure range anxiety cost'. Many results overlap with earlier EV searches. What are the top 3 barriers to EV adoption? One sentence each. Keep response under 80 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer: High upfront cost remains the primary barrier, as EV purchase prices still exceed comparable ICE vehicles despite declining battery costs. Range anxiety persists as a psychological concern, though 77% of EV owners report reduced anxiety after purchase. Insufficient charging infrastructure, particularly the lack of fast chargers and uneven geographic distribution, limits adoption for drivers without home charging access.
key_facts: High upfront purchase cost driven by battery prices is the single largest barrier to EV adoption
Range anxiety is a persistent psychological barrier, though it typically diminishes after purchase
Approximately 80% of US public chargers are slower Level 1 or Level 2, with fast chargers still insufficient
About one-third of UK drivers lack any way to charge an EV at home
